violations.text: The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety at all times when time temperature control for safety (TCS) food is being prepared, handled, and/or served. There are currently no employees certified in food safety management. Employees are currently enrolled in an online course in food safety management. New Violation. Correct By: 08/19/2025

Thermometers are lacking in refrigeration unit(s). All cold holding equipment used for time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods must have at least one thermometer inside the unit that is located to allow easy viewing of the temperature display. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 08/08/2025

The door to the outside, located in receiving, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. Part to seal door has been ordered. New Violation. Correct By: 08/08/2025
Refrigerator door gasket of the cold drawer observed in poor repair, split away from the drawer. Gasket has been ordered. New Violation. Correct By: 08/18/2025
The facility is lacking test strips to measure the concentration of the chlorine sanitizing solution for the 3-bay sink. Test strips have been ordered. New Violation. Correct By: 08/08/2025

The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety at all times when time temperature control for safety (TCS) food is being prepared, handled, and/or served. There are currently no employees certified in food safety management. Employees are currently enrolled in an online course in food safety management. New Violation. Correct By: 08/19/2025
The hand-washing sink was lacking paper towels. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 08/05/2025

The concentration in the sanitizing solution of the 3-bay sink was 0 parts per million (ppm). 3-bay sinks must have the proper concentration of sanitizing solution (chlorine: 50 - 100 ppm, quaternary ammonium: 200 - 400 ppm). Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 08/05/2025

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (ice machine) were observed with an accumulation of black residue and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Ice machine is being cleaned and sanitized. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 08/05/2025

Ambient temperature of slide cold hold unit was observed held at 45 degrees Fahrenheit. Butter observed with a temperature of 45 degrees F. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. TCS products were delivered this morning and were moved to properly functioning unit. No TCS foods are to be stored in this unit until it is serviced and maintaining a consistent temperature at/below 41 degrees F. New Violation. Correct By: 08/05/2025

Thermometers are lacking in the refrigeration unit(s). All cold holding equipment used for time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods must have at least one thermometer inside the unit that is located to allow easy viewing of the temperature display. New Violation. Correct By: 08/08/2025

The door to the outside, located in receiving, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 08/08/2025
Utensils were observed stored in stagnant water between uses. Utensils must be stored in a clean, dry location. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 08/05/2025
Refrigerator door gasket of the cold drawer observed in poor repair, split away from the drawer. Gasket must be replaced. New Violation. Correct By: 08/15/2025
The facility is lacking test strips to measure the concentration of the chlorine sanitizing solution for the 3-bay sink. New Violation. Correct By: 08/08/2025

The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety at all times when time temperature control for safety (TCS) food is being prepared, handled, and/or served. New Violation. Correct By: 09/29/2024

The chlorine concentration in the sanitizing solution of the 3-bay sink was 0 parts per million (ppm). The concentration of chlorine in the sanitizing solution must be between 50-100 ppm. 3-bay sink was properly set up at the time of inspection. Sanitizing dispenser is to be serviced. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 08/29/2024

Working containers of dry ingredients are not labeled with the common name of the food. Working containers holding food or food ingredients that are removed from their original packages, such as flour, herbs, salt, sugar, and spices must be labeled with the common name of the food. Containers were labeled at the time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 08/30/2024

The presence of small flies is not controlled as evidenced by live activity. The presence of insects, rodents, and other pests must be controlled by routinely inspecting the premises for evidence of pests, using acceptable methods to control pests, eliminating harborage conditions, and routinely inspecting incoming shipments of food and supplies. Pest control was observed in the establishment at the time of inspection. New Violation. Correct By: 08/29/2024
The gaskets in the lowboy draw units were observed in poor repair. New Violation. Correct By: 09/29/2024

The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety at all times when time temperature control for safety (TCS) food is being prepared, handled, and/or served. Employee has enrolled in food safety management course. Once course is successfully completed, employee is to register with RIDOH Center for Food Protection as Certified Food Safety Manager. New Violation. Correct By: 07/31/2023

Refrigerator door gasket of the lift-up chest unit observed in poor repair. New gasket has been ordered. In addition, the milk/creamer dispenser is not cold holding properly. Ice is being used to keep milk/cream cold. New machine is being ordered. New Violation. Correct By: 07/31/2023

The condensate from the slide refrigeration unit and the prep unit is draining into a container. Condensate drainage and other nonsewage liquids must drain into a drain. Condensate drainage is scheduled to be corrected. New Violation. Correct By: 07/31/2023

The floor at the ice machine and the walls of the kitchen prep room are not smooth, durable, easily cleanable, or non-absorbent. The materials for indoor floors must be durable, easily cleanable and nonabsorbent for areas subject to moisture such as food preparation areas, walk-in refrigerators, ware-washing areas, and toilet rooms. Floor and walls are scheduled to be repaired using proper materials. New Violation. Correct By: 09/29/2023
No person certified in food safety was present as needed at the time of inspection. New Violation. Correct By: 06/27/2023

The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety at all times when time temperature control for safety (TCS) food is being prepared, handled, and/or served. -Establishment shall enroll an employee in a food safety course. After completion of food safety course, establishment shall register employee as the Certified Food Safety Manager with RIDOH Center for Food Protection. -Proof or enrollment shall be provided to Inspector. New Violation. Correct By: 07/31/2023

A cigarette butt observed in the back area of the kitchen. Proper designated area for smoking reviewed. Staff removed the cigarette butt during this inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 06/27/2023

An employee observed rinsing bowls at the hand-washing sink. Proper wash, rinse, and sanitizing of utensils reviewed. Staff washed, rinsed, and sanitized at the 3 bay sink during this inspection. Dishes and utensils were observed in the hand-washing sink. A hand-washing sink must not be used for purposes other than hand washing. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 06/27/2023

Cacoila was observed not marked with the date of preparation. Ready-to-eat time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods prepared in the establishment and held for more than 24 hours must be marked with the date of preparation. New Violation. Correct By: 06/27/2023

Employees' medicines were observed stored in the food prep area located in the kitchen. Employees' medicines shall be stored in a designated area away from food prep area. -Staff moved the medicines during this inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 06/27/2023

Knives observed stored in an unclean surface between equipment. Proper storage of knives reviewed. Staff removed the knives to wash, rinse, and sanitize during this inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 06/27/2023
Refrigerator door gaskets at the dairy chest cooler were observed in poor repair. Gaskets shall be repaired or replaced. New Violation. Correct By: 07/31/2023

The milk/cream dispenser located in the front prep area was not in good repair. Unit is not holding temperature of 41 degrees F. or below. -Ice observed stored in dispenser to keep cream/milk cold. -Equipment shall be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 07/31/2023

The non-food contact surfaces of the inside of all refrigeration units and areas underneath/behind all equipment have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. The non-food contact surfaces shall be cleaned as often as necessary to prevent buildup of residue. New Violation. Correct By: 07/07/2023

The condensate from the sliding door refrigeration unit is draining into a container. Condensate from the sandwich station is draining inside unit. Condensate drainage and other nonsewage liquids must drain into a drain. New Violation. Correct By: 07/31/2023

The walls in the back kitchen area and floors in the ice machine area observed not smooth, durable, non-absorbent, or easily cleanable. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 09/29/2023
